daily_fact: Stay engaged with your community through local news and civic participation.
topline_md: As Staten Island braces for another storm reminiscent of the Blizzard of 2016, NYC faces a surge in crime, environmental lawsuits, and ongoing housing challenges, while local lawmakers push for rent control to support small businesses amidst rising tensions in various neighborhoods.
